001/**
002 * Maintains the fixed vocabulary of primary commands understood by the
003 * {@link Parser}.
004 * <p>
005 * Each entry must stay synchronized with the branches handled in
006 * {@link GameEngine#interpretCommand(String)}.
007 * </p>
008 *
009 * @author Michael Kolling and David J. Barnes + D. Bureau
010 * @version 2008.03.30 + 2019.09.25
011 */
012public class CommandWords {
013    /** All valid first words, in display order for help text. */
014    private String[] aValidCommands = {
015            "go",
016            "help",
017            "quit",
018            "look",
019            "cashin",
020            "back",
021            "test",
022            "name",
023            "take",
024            "drop",
025            "inventory"
026    };
027
028    /**
029     * Creates a CommandWords object containing all valid commands.
030     */
031    public CommandWords() {
032    }
033
034    /**
035     * Tests membership of {@code pString} in the internal command table
036     * (case-sensitive).
037     *
038     * @param pString candidate verb, usually lower-case
039     * @return {@code true} if {@code pString} is a known command word
040     */
041    public boolean isCommand(final String pString) {
042        for (int vI = 0; vI < this.aValidCommands.length; vI++) {
043            if (this.aValidCommands[vI].equals(pString)) {
044                return true;
045            }
046        }
047        return false;
048    } // isCommand()
049
050    /**
051     * Builds a single string listing every valid command, separated by spaces.
052     *
053     * @return space-delimited command list for help output
054     */
055    public String getCommandList() {
056        String vChaineDesCommandes = "";
057        for (String vCommand : this.aValidCommands) {
058            vChaineDesCommandes += vCommand + " ";
059        }
060        return vChaineDesCommandes;
061    } // getCommandList()
062} // CommandWords
